title: Kotatsu's Decoration Mod
description: This mod adds East Asian culture to your game with new furniture and decorations. Use paper lanterns, stone tiles, and paper screens to create beautiful spaces. Enhance your builds with various blocks for a unique gaming experience!
body:
[![Button Icon]][Link]

[Link]: https://discord.gg/X6sYCkN4ZV
[Button Icon]: https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-e37ea6.svg?style=flat-square&logo=Discord&logoColor=7e2b5e&labelColor=e6c1dd

[Link2]: https://kotatsus-decoration-mod-guide.fandom.com/wiki/Kotatsu%27s_Decoration_Mod_Guide_Wiki
[Button Icon2]: https://img.shields.io/badge/Wiki-92bad3.svg?style=flat-square&logo=Fandom&logoColor=00677f&labelColor=dce8ff

# ⚠️**STILL UNDER DEVELOPMENT**⚠️
# <font color=yellow>**DEVELOPMENT IS HALTED UNTIL LATE 2026 or 2027!** </font>





## WHAT IS THE MOD? WHAT IT ADDS?

This mod aims to add new furniture and decorations. All the decorations and items are inspired by East Asian culture, such as shoji doors, paper lanterns, and more! The mod also adds new music discs inspired by its theme, making it much more immersive. If you are curious, you can see the block's catalogue in the images!

## HOW TO INSTALL?

Kotatsu's Decoration Mod

First, you need to install Fabric for 1.20.1. I recommend installing the newest version. Afterwards, you will look for the most up-to-date version of the Fabric API for 1.20.1 and put it all in the mods folder!


## WHY SHOULD I DOWNLOAD IT?

Because it's cool! :D

Just kidding! 
If you want to level up your Asian-inspired buildings, I think you will like this mod's content! Give it a shot!


## WHY?

I started with this mod idea because when making a mod pack for a single-player world, I couldn't find a mod that added what I was looking for, so I thought I'd make it myself. And now, here we are!

## THE DEVELOPMENT SITUATION!

We are still under development, and as I am working alone and can't give too much time to the project, the progress is slow.

## THE DISCORD SERVER

We have a Discord server now! 
There, you can report bugs, make suggestions and ask questions about the mod. Also, the objective is to create a gentle and kind community!
